title: Transit visa: How to apply  - Canada.ca
content:
Apply for your transit visa before coming to Canada. Apply online, unless you
- have a disability that prevents you from applying online
- hold an identity or travel document for non-national residents, refugees or stateless persons
In these cases, you can apply on paper .
- Information you’ll need during the application process You’ll need to enter the following information when applying online: Personal details This includes personal information like your full name, your date and place of birth, your marital status and your residence history. Travel documents details This includes information from your valid passport or travel document, as well as your national identity document and US PR card, if applicable. You should also provide proof that you hold a valid visa for your intended country of destination, if required. Finances It’s recommended that you provide proof that you have sufficient funds to support your trip to your destination country. If someone is supporting you financially for your trip, you should provide proof that this person has sufficient funds. Education history Tell us if you have any post-secondary education, including university, college or apprenticeship training. Criminality, security and medical background You will be asked to provide information about your criminal and medical history. Family information If you’re travelling with other members of your family, you must provide their information.

## Information you’ll need during the application process
You’ll need to enter the following information when applying online:
This includes personal information like your full name, your date and place of birth, your marital status and your residence history.
This includes information from your valid passport or travel document, as well as your national identity document and US PR card, if applicable. You should also provide proof that you hold a valid visa for your intended country of destination, if required.
It’s recommended that you provide proof that you have sufficient funds to support your trip to your destination country. If someone is supporting you financially for your trip, you should provide proof that this person has sufficient funds.
Tell us if you have any post-secondary education, including university, college or apprenticeship training.
You will be asked to provide information about your criminal and medical history.
If you’re travelling with other members of your family, you must provide their information.
- Get into the IRCC Portal You can apply online using the IRCC Portal. If it’s your first time using the IRCC Portal, you need to get an invite code to create an account. Once you have your code, you can create your account in the portal and sign in. Make sure to keep this page open for instructions on how to apply. Get an invite code to create an account Get invite code If you already have an account, you can sign in directly. Access your account

## Get into the IRCC Portal
You can apply online using the IRCC Portal.
If it’s your first time using the IRCC Portal, you need to get an invite code to create an account. Once you have your code, you can create your account in the portal and sign in.
Make sure to keep this page open for instructions on how to apply.
Get an invite code to create an account
If you already have an account, you can sign in directly.
- Start the application process Follow the steps below to start your transit visa application once you’ve signed into the IRCC Portal: Read and accept the terms and conditions. Click on “Apply for a visitor visa or transit visa.” Check the box after reading the information displayed, and click on “Start application.” Answer the questions in the online form. You should reach a page indicating that you’re applying for a transit visa. If you see something different, check your answers again. Click on “Continue your application.” Answer the questions in the online form. Once you reach the “Summary of your information” page, review the information entered to make sure it’s accurate and click on “Save and continue.”

## Start the application process
Follow the steps below to start your transit visa application once you’ve signed into the IRCC Portal:
- Read and accept the terms and conditions.
- Click on “Apply for a visitor visa or transit visa.”
- Check the box after reading the information displayed, and click on “Start application.”
- Answer the questions in the online form.
- You should reach a page indicating that you’re applying for a transit visa. If you see something different, check your answers again.
- Click on “Continue your application.”
- Answer the questions in the online form. Once you reach the “Summary of your information” page, review the information entered to make sure it’s accurate and click on “Save and continue.”
- Documents you’ll need to support your application At this stage, you’ll need to add supporting and optional documents to your online application. Mandatory supporting documents travel itinerary national identity document passport or travel document Optional documents consent personal information form (IMM 0707) employer letter valid visa of your final destination proof of financial support additional documents

## Documents you’ll need to support your application
At this stage, you’ll need to add supporting and optional documents to your online application.
- national identity document
- passport or travel document
- consent personal information form (IMM 0707)
- valid visa of your final destination
- proof of financial support
- additional documents
- Complete your application At this stage, you’ll need to fill and sign the Consent and declaration page. You’ll then be taken to the Pay your fees page. There are no fees associated with the transit visa, so you can simply click on “Save and Continue.” You should then reach a page confirming that your application has been submitted.

## Complete your application
At this stage, you’ll need to fill and sign the Consent and declaration page.
You’ll then be taken to the Pay your fees page. There are no fees associated with the transit visa, so you can simply click on “Save and Continue.”
You should then reach a page confirming that your application has been submitted.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
